series_metadata.series_description: Files relating to individual''s employment at the agency. May include, but is not limited to, civil service applications, personnel actions, performance evaluations, new hire information firms, education documents, disciplinary actions (unless previously expunged), training certificates/licenses/degrees, professional reference letters, address change forms, transcripts, resumes, positions descriptions, tuition reimbursement forms, correspondence, background check forms, exit interview questionnaires, medical information, benefit information, resignation documents, and unemployment documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two (2) years following employee''s separation ; Electronic: following separation
